subcodes.first_line: O joyous bearer of success! Your blessed letter arrived, and its contents were replete with proofs and loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سرورکامگارا نامه مبارک شما رسید مضمون مشحون بحجت و مهربانی بود
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @personal instructions
